name: denied
description: US3 — step without allow_user_input; CLI call must be rejected

steps.instruction: export PATH="${WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_DIR}/bin:${PATH}" && wheel flag-needs-input "try to pause"; if [[ $? -eq 1 ]]; then echo "permission denied as expected"; fi; write {"attempted_pause": "denied"} to .wheel/outputs/no-perm.json.
